zh.lifeSummary: 當Avena de Villiers於大約1295年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾吉努爾頓時，她的父親Payn de Villiers30歲，母親Mrs. Payn Villers26歲。她於1316年與Sir Thomas Ireland結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。她去世於1383年享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avena de Villiers于大约1295年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾吉努爾頓时，她的父亲Payn de Villiers30岁，母亲Mrs. Payn Villers26岁。她于1316年与Sir Thomas Ireland结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。她去世于1383年享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Villiers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Villiers, the name of several places in France, all named from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’ (see Villars ). Compare Devilliers .

variants.name: Villars
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri.

French: habitational name from any of various places called Villars, from Late Latin villare ‘(part of an) outlying farm, dependent settlement’, a derivative of Latin villa ‘country house, estate’ (later used of a group of houses forming a settlement).

nameMeanings.name: Avena
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alberto, Ana, Arturo, Blanca, Domingo, Felipe, Francisco, Gerado, Gerardo, Gilberto, Guillermo.  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Antonio, Carmine, Giuseppe, Leonardo, Vito, Carmela, Ettore, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian and Spanish: metonymic occupational name for a grain grower or merchant, from avena ‘oats, oatmeal’ (from Latin avena).
Italian: habitational name from a place in Calabria called Avena.

variants.name: Aveni
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Antonio, Domenic, Enza, Gino, Pasquale, Philomena, Vincenzo.  Spanish Elva, Nestor, Ricardo, Rosario.
Italian: either a metonymic occupational name for a seller of oats (see Avena ) or from the Latin personal name Avenius.

en.lifeSummary: When Avena de Villiers was born about 1295, in Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Payn de Villiers, was 30 and her mother, Mrs. Payn Villers, was 26. She married Sir Thomas Ireland in 1316. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. She died in 1383, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avena de Villiers est née environ 1295, à Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Payn de Villiers, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Payn Villers, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Ireland en 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1383, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avena de Villiers um 1295 in Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Payn de Villiers 30 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Payn Villers 26. Sie hat 1316 Sir Thomas Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1383 im Alter von 89 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avena de Villiers è nata il circa 1295 nel Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Payn de Villiers, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Payn Villers, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Ireland nel 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1383, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Avena de Villiersが約1295年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアキノウルトンで生まれた時，父Payn de Villiersは30歳，母Mrs. Payn Villersは26歳であった。1316年にSir Thomas Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1383年に89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Avena de Villiers(이)가 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 킨우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Payn de Villiers(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Payn Villers(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1316년 Sir Thomas Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avena de Villiers nasceu aproximadamente 1295, em Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Payn de Villiers, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Payn Villers, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Ireland em 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1383, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avena de Villiers родилась около 1295 г. в местности киноултон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Payn de Villiers было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Payn Villers, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Ireland в 1316 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1383 г. в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avena de Villiers nació aproximadamente 1295, en Kinoulton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Payn de Villiers, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs. Payn Villers, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Ireland en 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1383, a la edad de 89 años.
